entities.name: Basyon
entities.raw_quote: true God Basyon, and by the name[s] On, Berion, Sabaoth, [and] Adonay

entities.name: On
entities.raw_quote: by the name[s] On, Berion, Sabaoth, [and] Adonay

entities.name: Berion
entities.raw_quote: On, Berion, Sabaoth, [and] Adonay

entities.name: Sabaoth
entities.raw_quote: On, Berion, Sabaoth, [and] Adonay

entities.name: Adonay
entities.raw_quote: On, Berion, Sabaoth, [and] Adonay

entities.name: Discobermath
entities.raw_quote: open up to us, Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Archidemath
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Fritath
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Altramat
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Pestiferat
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Helyberp
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Hegergibet
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Sathan
entities.raw_quote: Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath, Altramat, Pestiferat, Helyberp, Hegergibet, Sathan

entities.name: Sona
entities.raw_quote: I conjure you, Sona, by the name of the Lord Tetragrammaton...

entities.name: Tetragrammaton
entities.raw_quote: by the name of the Lord Tetragrammaton

entities.name: Joth
entities.raw_quote: by the name of God Joth, and by the name of God Nabnoth

entities.name: Nabnoth
entities.raw_quote: Joth, and by the name of God Nabnoth

entities.name: Astaroth
entities.raw_quote: writes the name of the boy and the name Astaroth on the knife handle

entities.name: Haram

attributes.role: benign spirit who appears in dream to reveal treasure

entities.raw_quote: on the following night Haram, a benign spirit, may come to me in my sleep...

entities.name: Minon

attributes.role: king conjured by princes of the nail (Jewish parallel)

entities.raw_quote: bring the king Minon in this nail, and the queen shall also come with him

entities.name: princes of the thumb/nail
entities.raw_quote: conjure the ‘princes of the thumb’... princes of the nail

entities.name: princes of the hand
entities.raw_quote: Another ritual... for conjuring ‘the princes of the hand’

entities.name: Semiforas

attributes.role: great Hebrew name for God, i.e., Shem ham-Mforash

entities.raw_quote: 'the great name Semiforas' (meaning the Shem hem-Mforash)

entities.name: SATOR-AREPO

attributes.role: magical formula inscribed in circle or whispered

entities.raw_quote: say ‘Sator Arepo Tenet Opera Rotas’... a garbled version of the SATOR-AREPO formula

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: send the angels Michael, Gabriel and Raphael to reveal whatever information

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: Michael, Gabriel and Raphael

entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: Michael, Gabriel and Raphael

entities.name: black man (demon form)

attributes.role: typical appearance of demons in visions

entities.raw_quote: demons to appear... in the form of black men

entities.name: king (spirit form)

attributes.role: demon appearing as monarch, seated on throne

entities.raw_quote: the conception of a demon as a king or prince... he is allowed the privilege of a throne and a meal

entities.name: ram (ritual animal)
entities.raw_quote: send wherever he will for a ram to be skinned and cooked... the ram set before him

entities.name: olive oil
entities.raw_quote: anoints four joints of the boy’s left hand with olive oil... anoints his nail with olive oil

entities.name: knife (black- or white-horn handle)

attributes.role: used to scrape nails, inscribe parchment

entities.raw_quote: scrapes the boy’s right thumbnail... using a knife with a handle of black or white horn

entities.name: feather (from left wing of black hen)
entities.raw_quote: writing on the vessel with a feather from the left wing of a black hen

entities.name: bronze bowl/saucer
entities.raw_quote: take a bronze bowl or saucer and fill it with water

entities.name: green olive oil

attributes.role: added to water for bowl divination

entities.raw_quote: add green olive oil, recite an incantation over it

entities.name: blood of bird (hoopoe?)
entities.raw_quote: draw on it a ‘circle’... markings... made with the blood of a bird, perhaps a hoopoe

entities.name: bird heart

attributes.role: writing instrument for inscribing cloth circle

entities.raw_quote: use the heart of this bird as a writing instrument

entities.name: virgin boy/girl (medium)
entities.raw_quote: entering the circle with a virgin boy or girl... under twelve years of age

entities.name: three-legged stool

attributes.role: seat for medium in circle rituals

entities.raw_quote: the boy sits on a three-legged stool

entities.name: sword (ritual)

attributes.role: used for blessing, protection, and exodus

entities.raw_quote: waving a sword around his head... companions... sit silently by the circle, with swords in hand

entities.name: circle (ritual space)
entities.raw_quote: simple circle, consisting of three concentric bands... boy sits on a three-legged stool

entities.name: Sator-arepo formula
entities.raw_quote: While making a circle, the master should say ‘Sator Arepo Tenet Opera Rotas’

entities.name: Asperges me, domine

attributes.role: liturgical antiphon used in treasure ritual

entities.raw_quote: sprinkle yourself with holy water, saying the antiphon, Asperges me, domine, ysopo

entities.name: Miserere mei, deus
entities.raw_quote: say before it, Miserere mei, deus [Ps. 50 Vulg.], in its entirety

entities.name: Orient (divine epithet)
entities.raw_quote: O gracious Orient... strengthen my understanding
